$comment: Expected canonical post-migration state for docs/save_compat/manifest.json's b3-lua-versioned baseline's lua-building-spawn-v1 fixture (issue #766). The tracked .bin is a REAL v1-shaped building_spawn payload -- bare-number lastUid, no __owner -- encoded through the genuine scripts/lib/data_codec.lua M.encode (via a real HsLua VM; see Test.Headless.Lua.SaveModules's 'tracked v1 fixtures from disk' describe block). building_spawn's own buildingSpawnReferences (scripts/building_spawn.lua) never sets an owner field on its edges (unlike unit_ai_save_refs.lua's), so 'owner' is intentionally absent here, not merely omitted.
